privileged_info_summary: The task involves uploading product images for WooCommerce product SKU WBH-001 (Wireless Bluetooth Headphones, priced at $79.99). The main product image (headphones_main.jpg, 1000x667 JPEG) and gallery image (headphones_lifestyle.jpg, 1000x1512 JPEG) are real, publicly available images from Unsplash, not synthetically generated. Images are stored in /home/ga/Documents/ProductPhotos directory. The task requires setting the main image as the product thumbnail and adding the lifestyle image to the product gallery in WooCommerce admin interface.
